name: Laguna Nigel Fluted Accent Table Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add dimensional flair to your home with the Laguna Nigel Fluted Accent Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This brown accent table is designed in a square shape with fluted front for textured appeal that amps up the look of your space. Made with wood, this square accent table comes with a bottom shelf to give you extra space for newspapers, magazines and other items.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
